{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the 2006 book|the [[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary (2016)|2016 book]] or the 2018 book ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary, New Edition|The Complete Visual Dictionary, New Edition]]''}} {{Redlink}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:CompleteVisDic.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars:
The Complete Visual Dictionary'' |author=*[[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]]''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]'' *[[James Luceno]] *[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Dorling Kindersley|DK Publishing]] |release date=*[[September 25]], [[2006]]''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]'' *[[September 28]], [[2012]] {{C|Reprint edition}}{{BN|url=w/star-wars-complete-visual-dictionary-dk/1126811506|text=Star Wars Complete Visual Dictionary}} {{C|2012 edition}} |type=Hardcover |pages=272 |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=0756622387 |series=''[[Star Wars Visual Dictionaries]]'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] hardcover reference title that was first released by [[Dorling Kindersley|DK Publishing]] on [[September 25]], [[2006]]. It is a compilation of the first four entries in the ''[[Star Wars Visual Dictionaries]]'' series: ''[[Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary]]'' ([[1998]]), ''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Visual Dictionary]]'' ([[1999]]), ''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Visual Dictionary]]'' ([[2002]]), and ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]'' ([[2005]]) all combined into one book. ''The Complete Visual Dictionary'' features eighteen pages of new content, covering the planet [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]], the [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]], [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], clone battle tanks, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] personnel, patrons of [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2's]] inner workings, as well as a cross-section diagram of the [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]]. It also made changes to some entries on the original trilogy to reflect information from the prequels and a few minor retcons. The book was re-released in the United States with a different cover design on [[September 28]], [[2012]]. A third US edition was published in [[2016]] under the [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] brand; this version's cover features a built-in light module that readers can activate to "ignite" [[Yoda's lightsaber/Legends|Yoda's lightsaber]].
